subcodes.first_line: O friends of the All-Merciful! A few days ago a letter was written to the Spiritual Assembly and the divine friends, and still [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی چند روز پیش نامه بمحفل روحانی و احبای الهی مرقوم گردید و هنوز
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom
